description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the thebiftek/nette-tester Docker image with a mariadb:10.0.21 service, caches the vendor/ directory, and runs composer install in a global before_script. Define four stages: build, deploy, test, and cleanup, and set MySQL variables MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_USER, MYSQL_PASSWORD, and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD for the service. In the test stage add a test job that copies app/config/config.local.neon.ci to app/config/config.local.neon and then executes php tester tests -c tests/php.ini. No artifacts, caches, or conditional rules are specified, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
